title: Senior Doctor - Ipca Laboratories - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Ipca Laboratories - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Ipca Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ipca Laboratories:
Ipca Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories!
